description: Aidan Neil from LadderLabs discusses LadderCaster, the first fully on-chain game on Solana, and Buddylink, a referral and attribution protocol for businesses.
topic_summary: In this video, Aidan Neil introduces LadderCaster, highlighting its status as the first fully on-chain game on Solana [t=8:00]. He also explains Buddylink, which allows businesses to set up customizable referral systems and plans to include additional engagement tools [t=18:00].
